strategy.name: Hybrid AI — Supercator Edition
strategy.asset_class: Index futures / CFDs (NQ, NAS100). Also works on crypto + FX with adjusted timeframes.
sources: Hybrid AI indicator (Pine v5) — original chart indicator with Ichimoku + ADX + Kangaroo Tails + Fibonacci TPs
Optimized Auto Hybrid AI strategy (Pine v5) — execution variant with SMA trend filter, ATR trailing stop, break-even logic, equity protection. Tuned for 10-minute on NQ/NAS100.
Hybrid AI — Supercator Edition (Pine v6) — confluence scoring 0–100 with A+/A/B grades, Kumo/Kijun/ATR SL modes, Fib or R:R TPs, MTF confirmation, JSON webhook alerts
strategy.description: Ichimoku Cloud (Tenkan / Kijun / Senkou A & B / Chikou) + ADX/DMI trend strength + higher-timeframe confirmation + volume filter + optional pin bar. Every signal is scored 0–100 across nine factors and graded A+/A/B. Hard rules required to fire; the confluence score raises conviction. Best on 10-minute timeframe for NQ/NAS100.
strategy.preferred_session: RTH (US cash session) — 09:30–16:00 ET. Avoid lunch chop (12:00–13:30) and the first 5 minutes after open.

components.kijun_sen: Medium-term baseline (26-period midpoint). Acts as dynamic support/resistance.
components.senkou_span_a: Avg of Tenkan & Kijun, plotted 26 bars ahead. Leading edge of the cloud.
components.senkou_span_b: 52-period midpoint, plotted 26 bars ahead. Slower cloud edge.
components.kumo: The cloud — area between Span A and Span B. Green when A > B (bullish), red when A < B (bearish).
components.chikou_span: Current close plotted 26 bars back. Confirms trend vs past price.
components.kumo_thickness: Senkou A − Senkou B. Thin Kumo (< 30% of 50-bar avg thickness) signals weak conviction.

adx.description: ADX measures trend strength regardless of direction. Above 20 = trending, above 30 = strong trend. DI+ vs DI- determines direction.

mtf.method: Compare current 60m close to 60m Kijun-sen. Used to confirm signal direction.

volume_filter.description: Current bar volume must exceed 1.2× the 20-bar volume SMA. Filters out signals on dead candles.

rules.tail_to_range_ratio: > 0.6 in the direction of the signal

pin_bar_kangaroo_tail.description: Optional confirmation candle. Bull pin = long lower wick + close near high. Bear pin = long upper wick + close near low. Off by default; flip on to be more selective.

order_blocks.definition: A confirmed reversal candle where (a) prior candle direction flipped, (b) candle body > 0.5× ATR, (c) price is on the trend side of the Kumo.
order_blocks.use: Visual context only — do not fire entries off order blocks alone.

bullish: Price closes above Kumo top (Senkou A & B displaced 26 ahead)
Chikou Span above price from 26 bars ago
Future Kumo bullish (Senkou A slope > Senkou B slope)
bearish: Chikou Span below price from 26 bars ago
Future Kumo bearish (Senkou A slope < Senkou B slope)

long: TRIGGER: Tenkan-sen crosses above Kijun-sen on this bar's confirmed close
Pin bar in bull direction (if pin filter on)
Bar index warmed up: ≥ max(spanB + base, 80)
short: TRIGGER: Tenkan-sen crosses below Kijun-sen on this bar's confirmed close
Pin bar in bear direction (if pin filter on)

components.name: Price vs Kumo
components.rule: 20 if above (long) / below (short) Kumo, 8 if inside, 0 otherwise

components.name: ADX strength
components.rule: 12 if ADX > 30, 6 if ADX > min_strength, 0 otherwise

stop_loss.validation: If raw SL ends up on the wrong side of entry (rare in chop), fall back to entry ± 1.5 × ATR

take_profit.r_distance_cap: min(R, 5 × ATR) and max(R, 0.5 × ATR) — prevents absurd targets when SL is unusually tight or wide
take_profit.tp_ordering_validation: Each TP must be ≥ 0.3 ATR away from entry, with ≥ 0.1 ATR spacing between TPs

trailing.description: Once price moves 1.5 × ATR in your favor, move stop to break-even. Then trail by 1.0 × ATR.

time_stop.description: Close any trade that hasn't reached TP1 within 50 bars. Stale = not working.

risk_rules: Equity protection: hard close any open trade whose unrealized drawdown exceeds MAX_LOSS_PERCENT (default 1%) of equity
No new entries 15 min before market close
No new entries during major scheduled news (FOMC, CPI, NFP) — skip ±10 min around release
Paper trade for 30+ confirmed signals before flipping live

covers: Trading bias for NQ / NAS100 today (long, short, neutral) with rationale
Key support and resistance levels (overnight high/low, prior day high/low, daily pivots, ES gap zones)
Top financial news affecting US indices (Fed speakers, mega-cap earnings, geopolitics, China, energy)
Economic data calendar today with release times in ET (CPI, PPI, NFP, FOMC, retail sales, ISM, jobless claims, etc.)
Market sentiment edge: VIX level + change, breadth (advancers vs decliners), put/call ratio, fear & greed, DXY, 10y yield, AAII, NAAIM

notes: 10-minute is the optimal timeframe for the Optimized Auto Hybrid AI executor on NQ/NAS100. The Hybrid AI base indicator can be viewed on multiple TFs in parallel for context. The Supercator Edition's confluence scoring + SL/TP engine is the source of truth for grading. Do NOT apply this strategy to <5m timeframes — the indicators noise out and ADX whipsaws.
